citations.document_title: Accreditation Standards for Hospitals, 6th Edition Reference Guide
citations.document_publisher: National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers
citations.clause_text_summary: The organization must implement an infection prevention and control manual based on standard precautions and national policy frameworks.

citations.document_title: Accreditation Standards for Hospitals, 6th Edition Reference Guide
citations.document_publisher: National Accreditation Board for Hospitals & Healthcare Providers
citations.clause_text_summary: Medications must be stored under optimal conditions of cleanliness, security, and temperature, monitored and logged daily.

citations.document_title: Accreditation Standards for Hospitals, 6th Edition Reference Guide

citations.clause_text_summary: The organization must possess a valid Fire NOC or clearance certificate from competent local authorities to ensure structural safety.
